data.body: DE-RISK D (offline, MAJOR-5) PASSED: with the CURRENT 2N container cost, shed_to_budget DROPS G3 at N=20 and G3+G4 at N=40 (child-coverage/consistency silently unreviewed on large epics — the fidelity regression). Halving the container cost (merge, S4) pushes the shed threshold past N=40, but it still eventually sheds => the remediation's stronger rule (container criteria NEVER shed; cap bounds only overlay/agent) is the robust fix, with merge as a major mitigation. Confirms both the bug and the fix direction.
